spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Reorder imports to group third-party and local imports separately, moving local imports above Spring framework imports.
Replace tab-based indentation with 4-space indentation to comply with modern code style conventions.
Reformat method signatures and bodies to use 4-space indentation and align parameters for readability.
Reformat method signatures to align path variables on separate lines with 4-space indentation.
Reformat POST method body to use 4-space indentation and chain builder methods on separate lines.
Refactor the toString method to use a more compact String.format call structure.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.after:
return String.format("Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]",
				id, name, description, steps);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Simplify the equals method logic by removing redundant null checks and early returns.
Replace @Component with @Service annotation for better semantic clarity in Spring Boot 3.
Add final modifier to static list field to enforce immutability of the reference.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.before: private static List<Student> students = new ArrayList<>();
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.after: private static final List<Student> students = new ArrayList<>();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move SecureRandom initialization from method scope to field scope for efficiency.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.after: private final SecureRandom random = new SecureRandom();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace Arrays.asList with List.of for immutable list creation in Java 17.
Remove unused import for Arrays class after replacing Arrays.asList with List.of.
Refactor null check in retrieveCourses to use ternary operator for conciseness.
Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import for the @Test annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; tests will fail to compile if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed or if the project enforces JUnit 5 platform.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith annotation with JUnit 5 @ExtendWith annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: @RunWith is a JUnit 4 specific annotation and is ignored or causes errors in JUnit 5 platform; Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5 extensions.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 SpringRunner import with JUnit 5 SpringExtension import.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: SpringRunner is part of the JUnit 4 integration; SpringExtension is the JUnit 5 equivalent required for Spring Boot 3.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 imports to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) imports.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.Assert) are not part of the JUnit 5 API; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 5 is the active test engine without these imports.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with JUnit 5 @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class).
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: @RunWith is a JUnit 4 annotation and is ignored or causes errors in JUnit 5; Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5 extensions for test context loading.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Remove deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest and add @WithMockUser for security context.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: The 'secure' attribute was removed in Spring Boot 3 / Spring Security 6; tests requiring authentication must explicitly define the security context using @WithMockUser or similar.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace Arrays.asList() with List.of() for creating immutable lists.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: While Arrays.asList still compiles, List.of is the preferred modern Java 9+ API for immutable lists, aligning with JDK 17 best practices.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Update string literals to match new data format (removing spaces in description).
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: The underlying data model or service response format changed (e.g., '10 Steps' to '10Steps'), requiring test assertions to match the new output to prevent runtime assertion failures.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Reformat code indentation and line breaks to follow standard style guidelines.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove explicit @EnableAutoConfiguration annotation as its functionality is included in @SpringBootApplication.
Remove unused import for EnableAutoConfiguration after removing the annotation.
Enable the SecurityConfig class by uncommenting the @Configuration annotation.
Prefix in-memory passwords with {noop} to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ requirement for password encoding identifiers.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: Spring Security 5.8+ throws an IllegalArgumentException if a password is not prefixed with an encoding identifier (e.g., {noop}, {bcrypt}) when a PasswordEncoder bean is present.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to the new package location in Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.context.embedded.LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3.0; using the old import causes a compile error.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Add explicit throws declaration for JSONException to satisfy compiler requirements.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JSONAssert.assertEquals throws JSONException, which is a checked exception. Without the throws clause, the code fails to compile.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Add import for JSONException to support the new throws declaration.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The JSONException class is not imported by default; without this import, the throws clause causes a compile error.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update test data string to match expected output format.
Update test input data to match expected output format.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.before: Course course = new Course("Course1", "Spring", "10 Steps", Arrays

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest and add @WithMockUser to handle Spring Security auto-configuration in Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The 'secure' attribute was removed from @WebMvcTest in Spring Boot 3; without this change, the code fails to compile due to an unknown annotation attribute.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Add import for the new @WithMockUser annotation required for security context in tests.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The class references @WithMockUser but lacks the import, causing a compilation error.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update test data string to remove space in description to match expected output.
Update expected JSON string in test to match the modified description data.
Update expected plain text response in test to match the modified description data.

spring-boot-web-application/src/main/jav.general_idea: Add explicit NoOpPasswordEncoder to in-memory authentication configuration to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ requirement for password encoding.
spring-boot-web-application/src/main/jav.why_exists: Spring Security 5.8+ (used in Spring Boot 3) throws an IllegalArgumentException at runtime if no PasswordEncoder is configured for in-memory authentication, as it no longer allows plain text passwords by default.
